summary: MASN+ tabs displays in the Header
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for MASN
AND the user launches the MLB.tv app

*NOTE:* 
MASN entitlement = MASN_110

MASN Test users:

|Username|Password|
|masn@gmail.com|Password4MASN|
|masnims@gmail.com (In Market)|Password4MASN|
|masnoom@gmail.com (Out of Market)|Password4MASN|
|masnintl@gmail.com (International)|Password4MASN|

steps.result:
THEN the user should see [Home], [MASN+], [Games], [Upgrade MLB.TV], [Settings] in the header

**NOTE:** If the test user also has one of the following entitlements, "EXECMLB", "MLBALL", "MLBVIDEOADOBEPASS", "MLBVIDEOAR", [Upgrade MLB.TV] will NOT display.
